ci_support_linux_64_mpimpich.yaml:
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
fortran_compiler:
- gfortran
fortran_compiler_version:
- '14'
hdf5:
- 1.14.6
- '2'
mpi:
- mpich
mpich:
- '4'
netcdf_fortran:
- '4.6'
openmpi:
- '4'
petsc:
- '3.25'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: SFINCS: the Stellarator Fokker-Planck Iterative Neoclassical Conservative Solver
SFINCS: the Stellarator Fokker-Planck Iterative Neoclassical Conservative Solver
SFINCS: the Stellarator Fokker-Planck Iterative Neoclassical Conservative Solver

name: sfincs

about.summary: SFINCS: the Stellarator Fokker-Planck Iterative Neoclassical Conservative Solver
SFINCS: the Stellarator Fokker-Planck Iterative Neoclassical Conservative Solver

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "3.0.0"

recipe:
  name: sfincs-suite
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/landreman/sfincs/archive/refs/tags/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 67806cb26c02d592ccc2c56358c05a6bb1dc9111e1d85755a3d2d2b325a8f994

build:
  number: 2
  variant:
    # Default to MPICH over other variants
    down_prioritize_variant: ${{ 0 if mpi == "mpich" else 1 }}
  skip:
    - win

outputs:
  - package:
      name: sfincs
    build:
      string: mpi_${{ mpi }}_h${{ hash }}_${{ build_number }}
      script: build.sh
    requirements:
      run_exports:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("sfincs", upper_bound="x.x") }}
      build:
        - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
        - ${{ compiler("fortran") }}
        - make
        - grep
      host:
        - mpi [build=${{ mpi }}]
        - petsc
        - hdf5
        - hdf5 [build=mpi_${{ mpi }}_*]
        - netcdf-fortran
        - netcdf-fortran [build=mpi_${{ mpi }}_*]
      run:
        - petsc
        - libopenblas
        - matplotlib-base
        - h5py
    tests:
      - package_contents:
          strict: true
          bin:
            - sfincs
          lib:
            - sfincs
          files:
            - etc/conda/test-files/sfincs/*
      - files:
          source:
            - fortran/version3/examples/quick_2species_FPCollisions_noEr/input.namelist
            - fortran/version3/examples/quick_2species_FPCollisions_noEr/tests.py
            - fortran/version3/examples/testsCommon.py
        script:
          # OpenMPI needs a writable HOME and permission to run as root in containers
          - export HOME="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}"
          - export OMPI_ALLOW_RUN_AS_ROOT=1
          - export OMPI_ALLOW_RUN_AS_ROOT_CONFIRM=1
          # Check everything loads
          - sfincs
          # Run example
          - cd fortran/version3/examples/quick_2species_FPCollisions_noEr
          - mpiexec -n 1 sfincs
          # Validate output
          - python ./tests.py

  - package:
      name: sfincs-${{ mpi }}
    build:
      noarch: generic
      # Avoid inheriting built script and do nothing instead
      script: "true"
    requirements:
      run:
        # Pin to the exact build variant, which is the mpi variant that built
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("sfincs", exact=true) }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - which sfincs

about:
  summary: "SFINCS: the Stellarator Fokker-Planck Iterative Neoclassical Conservative Solver"
  license: BSD-2-Clause
  license_file: LICENSE
  homepage: https://github.com/landreman/sfincs
  repository: https://github.com/landreman/sfincs
  documentation: https://github.com/landreman/sfincs

extra:
  feedstock-name: sfincs
  recipe-maintainers:
    - landreman
    - matthewfeickert
